overall.description: A first-person perspective cyberpunk game scene beginning at an outdoor street stall in a dystopian city. The player character sits with companions before standing and walking through a rain-soaked plaza filled with debris, passing under a massive elevated highway with neon signage, and finally ascending a rusted metal stairway between dense industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area of street stall

agents.ego_description: sitting at wooden table with companions, observing the cyberpunk cityscape and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: female companion in red shirt and blue pants drinking from a cup
male companion in tactical gear sitting with drink in hand

entered.detail: makeshift outdoor seating with metal and wooden furniture under an awning
wooden table with various items including a firearm and drink containers
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with neon signage and holographic displays
glowing neon billboards and floating holographic commercials on distant buildings
metal and fabric awning providing partial cover over the seating area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view seated at an outdoor street stall in a cyberpunk city. Two companions sit nearby—a woman in a red shirt and a man in tactical gear—while futuristic skyscrapers with neon advertisements tower in the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with debris and cables

events.description: ego stands up from seated position and begins walking forward through the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza, navigating around puddles and scattered debris while approaching a seated individual

notable_agents.action: man sitting in folding chair near a green dumpster, holding a drink

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt surface with large reflective puddles and scattered trash
elevated pedestrian bridge or highway structure spanning across the plaza
thick black cables snaking across the wet ground
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags piled beside it

segments.scene_description: The camera stands and moves forward into a wide, flooded urban plaza. The ground is littered with cables and debris, with puddles reflecting the overcast sky. A man sits in a folding chair near a green dumpster ahead, while the massive cyberpunk skyline looms closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath elevated highway with market stalls

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered area beneath large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete overpass, passing a seated man and approaching two figures standing near market stalls

notable_agents.action: man in tank top sitting in folding chair with drink, watching the surroundings
two individuals standing and conversing under the overpass, one with distinctive green hair

entered.detail: massive curved concrete highway overpass with support pillars dominating the upper frame
makeshift vendor stalls with tarps and umbrellas set up under the overpass
rectangular colored light panels attached to the underside of the overpass glowing red and blue
large blue and white garbage bags stacked near the overpass supports

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered space beneath a massive concrete overpass. Neon light panels glow overhead while market stalls line the path. The camera passes a seated man and approaches two standing figures conversing near trash bag piles, with the cyberpunk towers now visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rusted metal stairway ascending between dense industrial structures

events.description: approaching and entering narrow stairway between corrugated metal buildings
beginning ascent up metal staircase to upper level overlooking rooftops

agents.ego_description: climbing rusted metal stairs with handrails, looking down at corrugated rooftops and industrial equipment below

entered.detail: steep rusted metal staircase with corrugated treads and orange railings
orange-brown metal pipe railings along both sides of the stairs
makeshift buildings with corrugated metal walls and roofs adjacent to the stairs
large cylindrical rusted water tank on a platform
white satellite dishes mounted on the rooftops below

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow enclosed stairway between industrial structures. The camera ascends rusted metal stairs with orange railings, passing corrugated metal shacks and an industrial water tank. Below, satellite dishes and makeshift rooftops are visible as the stairway climbs higher into the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a social gathering at a street stall into the depths of a dense, industrial urban canyon. It begins seated beside companions under an overcast sky, before the camera stands and moves forward into a wide, flooded plaza littered with cables and debris. As the camera advances, the open plaza shifts into a semi-covered space beneath a massive concrete overpass where neon panels glow above market stalls and piles of trash. The scene then narrows as the camera turns away from the distant skyline to enter a cramped industrial corridor. Finally, the perspective ascends a series of rusted metal stairs with orange railings, climbing past corrugated shacks and water tanks high above the makeshift rooftops and satellite dishes below.
